problem: Mobile UX felt like a single long scrolling page, making the core flow harder to navigate.
fixes: Added mobile-only app shell with bottom tabs: Timer, Routines, Progress, Awards.
Kept desktop full-page Apple-style layout unchanged.
Moved mobile timer action bar above the section tab bar.
Selecting a routine returns mobile users to the Timer view.
Adjusted mobile tile sizing and bottom padding so each view feels like a focused screen.
verification_plan: Browser smoke mobile 390x844 to verify only one mobile view is visible at a time.
Verify bottom nav buttons are 52px touch targets.
Verify tab switching changes visible content without horizontal overflow.
Verify timer sticky controls do not overlap bottom tab bar.
